DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string that represents the Git hash of the repository.
DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.purpose: Helps in identifying the exact version of the game code being used, ensuring players get the latest updates.

FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Uses a fast string to manage timestamps for flipping features on and off.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Allows for quicker updates and changes in gameplay features, enhancing player experience with timely adjustments.

FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Stores a fast string version of the Git hash for the repository.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Enables rapid identification of the game version, ensuring players are always on the latest build.

DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.mechanism: Utilizes a dynamic string to handle timestamps for feature toggling.
DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.purpose: Facilitates real-time updates and feature changes, improving the overall gameplay experience for players.
